principles: Fusion over Imitation: Japanese minimalism meets Spanish passion.
Emotion First: The booking process should feel like a ritual, not a form.
Content is King: Food is the hero. Use negative space to frame it.
Negative Space: Value empty areas; they represent 'Ma' (the space between).
Contrast: Gold (#C9A24A) on Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) for maximum impact.

usage.text: Off-white (#E5E5E5) for body, Gold (#C9A24A) for headers and accents.
usage.backgrounds: Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as base. No pure black. Use #121212 for cards.
usage.borders: Subtle 1px borders in #2A2A2A. Active elements get Gold borders.

headings.style: Elegant, high-contrast serif. Use for all section titles.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay or gold leaf texture sparingly.

images.description: Dimly lit table setting, moody, elegant.
Gold texture for accents or text masking.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A24A] text-black hover:bg-[#D4AF5F] rounded-none px-8 py-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C9A24A] text-[#C9A24A] hover:bg-[#C9A24A] hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-[#E5E5E5] hover:text-[#C9A24A] transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:border-[#C9A24A] focus:ring-0 transition-all placeholder:text-[#555]
inputs.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-[#888] mb-2

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none p-8 hover:border-[#C9A24A]/50 transition-colors

layouts.home_hero: Full screen height (h-screen). Background image with overlay. Centered typography. 'Book Table' CTA.
layouts.booking_wizard: Centered layout. Steps indicator at top (1. Date > 2. Time > 3. Details). Animate transitions between steps.
layouts.admin_dashboard: Sidebar layout. Dense data tables. High contrast text for readability.

universal_guidelines.css_reset: Ensure box-sizing: border-box. Remove default margins.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios for gold text on black background. Use aria-labels.
universal_guidelines.interactions: All interactive elements must have hover states. Use 'cursor-pointer'.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js with the colors defined in visual_language.
2. INSTALL required fonts (Playfair Display, Montserrat) via Google Fonts in index.html.
3. BUILD the components using the 'rounded-none' and 'border-b' aesthetic. No rounded corners.
4. IMPLEMENT the Reservation Wizard state machine (Date -> Period -> Time -> Form).
5. USE the provided image URLs for the Landing Page.
6. ENSURE the Admin Panel is functional and follows the dark theme.
